metadata.title: Pixel Banner
metadata.description: Apply an image from various sources as a banner to your notes.

text: `欢迎使用 \u{1F6A9} Pixel Banner v${this.version}`

regex.source: text: "After each update you'll be prompted with the release notes. You can disable this in the plugin settings General tab."
regex.target: text: "每次更新后，您都会看到发布说明。您可以在插件设置的常规选项卡中禁用此功能。"

regex.source: text: "Enter a name for the image file."
text: "Select an image from your vault or upload a new one."
regex.target: text: "从您的库中选择图片或上传一张新图片。"

regex.source: text: "Enter your Pexels API key. Get your API key from "
regex.target: text: "输入您的Pexels API密钥。从以下位置获取API密钥 "

regex.source: text: "Enter your Pixabay API key. Get your API key from "
regex.target: text: "输入您的Pixabay API密钥。从以下位置获取API密钥 "

regex.source: text: "Enter your Flickr API key. Get your API key from "
regex.target: text: "输入您的Flickr API密钥。从以下位置获取API密钥 "

regex.source: text: "Enter your Unsplash API key (Access Key). Get your API key from "
regex.target: text: "输入您的Unsplash API密钥 (Access Key)。从以下位置获取API密钥 "
.setName("横幅渐隐效果动画持续时间")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the API provider for fetching images")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择用于获取图片的API提供商")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show a pin icon on random banner images that allows saving them to your vault. Once pinned, your frontmatter will be updated to use the local image instead of the API image.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在随机横幅图片上显示固定图标，允许将它们保存到您的库中。一旦固定，您的前置元数据将更新为使用本地图片而非API图片。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Default folder where pinned banner images will be saved")
regex.target: .setDesc("固定的横幅图片将保存到的默认文件夹")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show a refresh icon on random banner images that allows fetching a new random image.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在随机横幅图片上显示刷新图标，允许获取新的随机图片。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the size of the image - (API only)")
.setDesc("Select the orientation of the image - (API only)")
.setDesc("Enter a comma-separated list of default keywords to be used when no keyword is provided in the frontmatter, or when the provided keyword does not return any results. - (API only)")
regex.target: .setDesc("输入默认关键词的逗号分隔列表，当前置元数据中未提供关键词或提供的关键词未返回任何结果时使用。 - (仅限API)")

regex.source: .setDesc("Randomly select an image from a specified folder each time the note loads")
regex.target: .setDesc("每次加载笔记时从指定文件夹随机选择图片")

regex.source: .setDesc("Folder containing images to randomly select from")
regex.target: .setDesc("包含要随机选择图片的文件夹")

regex.source: .setDesc("Apply banner only to direct children of the folder")
regex.target: .setDesc("仅对文件夹的直接子项应用横幅")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set a default folder path to filter images when opening the Select Image modal")
regex.target: .setDesc("打开“选择图像”模式时，设置默认文件夹路径以过滤图像")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the horizontal position of the image (0-100)")
.setDesc("Set the vertical position of the image (0-100)")
.setDesc("Set the default vertical position where the content starts (in pixels)")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置内容开始的默认垂直位置（像素）")
.setDesc('当选择"适应"时启用图片重复')

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the default fade in animation duration for the banner image (0-1000 milliseconds)")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the default border radius of the banner image (0-50 pixels)")

regex.source: text: "Add a banner first to enable customization options."
regex.target: text: "先添加横幅以启用自定义选项。"

regex.source: text: "Select an AI model for Banner generation"
regex.target: text: "选择用于横幅生成的AI模型"

regex.source: text: "\u{1F3F7}\uFE0F Download and Use as Banner"
text: "You have already downloaded this image. Do you want to download it again?"
regex.target: text: "您已经下载过这张图片。是否要再次下载？"

regex.source: text: `Please confirm you want to delete "IMGDESCRIPTION" from your AI Generated Banner History. This will not delete any images you have previously downloaded to your vault.`
regex.target: text: `请确认您要从AI生成的横幅历史记录中删除"IMGDESCRIPTION"。这不会删除您之前已下载到库中的任何图片。`

regex.source: text: "Failed to load AI banner generator. Please try again later."
regex.target: text: "加载AI横幅生成器失败。请稍后重试。"

regex.source: text: "\u2728 Generate a Banner with AI"
text: 'TIP \u21E2 Type a few words and then press the "\u{1F331} GROW IDEA" button to transform your basic idea into something special! Select a Model and then click "\u2728 Generate Banner".'
regex.target: text: 'TIP \u21E2 输入几个词，然后点击"\u{1F331} 发挥创意"按钮，将您的基本想法转变为特别的内容！选择一个模型，然后点击"\u{2728} 生成横幅"。'

regex.source: text: "No AI models available. Please try again later."
regex.target: text: "没有可用的AI模型。请稍后重试。"

regex.source: text: "You have no remaining banner tokens \u{1F62D}. Please purchase more tokens to generate a banner. Your previous banners (if any) will still be available for download below."
regex.target: text: "您没有剩余的横幅代币 \u{1F62D}。请购买更多代币来生成横幅。您之前的横幅（如果有）仍可在下方下载。"

regex.source: text: `Click an image to download and use as a banner. These downloads are always FREE as you have already paid to generate them. Images older than one month are subject to deletion from our servers.`
regex.target: text: `点击图片下载并用作横幅。这些下载始终是免费的，因为您已经付费生成它们。超过一个月的图片可能会从我们的服务器上删除。`

regex.source: text: `Are you sure you want to delete "${file.name}"?`

regex.target: text: "\u2B50 选择横幅图标图片"

regex.target: text: "选择一张图片作为横幅图标。"

regex.target: text: "输入图片文件的直接URL（jpg, png, gif等）。"

text: `第 ${this.iconsCurrentPage} 页，共 ${totalPages} 页 (${totalCount} 个图标)`

regex.source: text: "\u{1F4F0} Set Banner Icon Emoji & Text"
regex.target: text: "\u{1F4F0} 设置横幅图标表情和文本"

regex.source: text: `Use the form below to optionally set an emoji and/or text as this note's Banner Icon. Leave the value blank and click the "Update Banner Icon" button to clear any existing banner icon if it exists.`
regex.target: text: `使用下面的表单可选择性地设置表情和/或文本作为此笔记的横幅图标。留空并点击 "Update Banner Icon" 按钮可清除任何现有的横幅图标（如果存在）。`

regex.source: text: "Failed to load store. Please try again later."
regex.target: text: "加载商店失败。请稍后重试。"

regex.source: text: `Browse the Pixel Banner Plus Store to find the perfect banner for your needs. Banner Token prices are displayed on each card below (FREE or 1 Banner Token). Previous purchases will be listed as FREE.`
regex.target: text: `浏览Pixel Banner Plus商店，找到适合您需求的完美横幅。横幅代币价格显示在下方每张卡片上（免费或1个横幅代币）。之前的购买将标记为免费。`

regex.source: text: "Failed to load categories. Please try again later."
regex.target: text: "加载分类失败。请稍后重试。"

regex.source: text: "Failed to load images. Please try again."
text: `Failed to search images: ${error.message}. Please try again.`
text: "Error displaying images: Invalid data format"
regex.target: text: "显示图片错误：无效的数据格式"

regex.source: text: `\u{1FA99} ${decimalToFractionString(this.cost)} Banner Token${this.cost > 1 ? "s" : ""} (this is not a monitary transaction). Once purchased, the banner will be added to your vault, and will be free to download while listed in the store.`
regex.target: text: `\u{1FA99} ${decimalToFractionString(this.cost)} 横幅代币${this.cost > 1 ? "s" : ""} (这不是金钱交易)。购买后，横幅将添加到您的库中，并且在商店列出期间可以免费下载。`

regex.source: text: "\u{1F310} Optionally select which 3rd party API provider to use for displaying random images."
regex.target: text: "\u{1F310} 可选择使用哪个第三方API提供商来显示随机图片。"

regex.source: text: "Add keyword(s) to the banner frontmatter to display random API images matching the keywords."
regex.target: text: "在横幅前置元数据中添加关键词，以显示与关键词匹配的随机API图片。"

regex.source: text: "\u{1F5C3}\uFE0F Configure banner settings for specific folders. These settings will override the default settings for all notes in the specified folder."
regex.target: text: "\u{1F5C3}\uFE0F 为特定文件夹配置横幅设置。这些设置将覆盖指定文件夹中所有笔记的默认设置。"

regex.source: text: '\u{1F5FA}\uFE0F Customize the frontmatter field names used for Pixel Banner. You can define multiple names for each field, separated by commas. Field names can only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores. Example: "banner, pixel-banner, header_image" could all be used as the banner field name.'
regex.target: text: '\u{1F5FA}\uFE0F 自定义用于Pixel Banner的前置元数据字段名称。您可以为每个字段定义多个名称，用逗号分隔。字段名称只能包含字母、数字、破折号和下划线。例如："banner, pixel-banner, header_image"都可以用作横幅字段名称。'

regex.source: text: "\u2699\uFE0F Configure default settings for all notes."
regex.target: text: "\u2699\uFE0F 为所有笔记配置默认设置。"

regex.source: text: "Pixel Banner Plus enhances your notes with AI-generated, high-quality banners. Using a token-based system, you can instantly create stunning, customized visuals\u2014no design skills needed. Sign up for free to access the banner store, which includes a selection of zero-token banners at no cost. No subscription required\u2014simply purchase tokens whenever you need AI-generated designs. Transform your Obsidian workspace with professional banners, starting for free and only adding tokens as needed."
regex.target: text: "Pixel Banner Plus使用AI生成的高质量横幅增强您的笔记。使用基于代币的系统，您可以即时创建令人惊叹的自定义视觉效果\u2014无需设计技能。免费注册即可访问横幅商店，其中包含免费的零代币横幅选择。无需订阅\u2014只需在需要AI生成设计时购买代币即可。从免费开始，仅在需要时添加代币，为您的Obsidian工作空间增添专业横幅。"

regex.source: text: "Purchase tokens to download Banners from the Store or Generate them with AI \u2728"
regex.target: text: "购买代币从商店下载横幅或使用AI生成横幅 \u2728"

regex.source: text: 'Customize the frontmatter field names used for the banner and Y-position. You can define multiple names for each field, separated by commas. Field names can only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores. Example: "banner, pixel-banner, header_image" could all be used as the banner field name.'
regex.target: text: '自定义横幅和Y位置使用的属性字段名称。您可以通过用逗号分隔为每个字段定义多个名称。字段名称只能包含字母、数字、破折号和下划线，如“banner, pixel-banner, header_image”都可以作为横幅字段名称。'
